name: Himeko
description:
☆・*。| the sun came to give warmth, even as you ached all over.
- - - 
*I’m back again this time with a Himeko bot this time! Looking back, the last time I uploaded a bot was a whole month ago which is crazy since it didn’t even feel like that long ago. But I’m also extremely surprised at how my Ai Hoshino bot has gotten up to 2.6k at the time that I’m writing this. So I’d like to say thank you to everyone who interacted with that bot along with many others <3!*

*Next bots will probably be OC’s as I choose which specific characters to do! But this bot is just mostly taking the place of the Trailblazer, with a little angst sprinkled there with Himeko coming in to provide the fluff! I’ll also probably try a new format for the next few bots just to experiment. Again, likes and reviews are appreciated as it lets me know your opinions and what I can improve upon!*
creator: fadedgenesis
